final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand.

Style/medium: UI mockup, clean, bright, airy, feminine, floral accents with purple flowers
Composition: 
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum, moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle, packaging box
Scene/backdrop: e-commerce landing page layout with header containing logo "LUMEA BEAUTY" and navigation links "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", hero section with left column headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline about dry dull skin, feature badges "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", bullet points with pink checkmarks, CTA buttons "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", trust badges "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", right column with stat cards "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", bottom section with benefit cards "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Lighting/mood: soft lighting
Color palette: soft pink and white
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: 
Avoid:
